case_title: JOSHUA WIDICK VS. JON AYATHAN KEREY

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY WIDICK, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT KEREY, JON AYATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-03-2014 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $35.00) SERVED JAN-24-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KEREY, JON AYATHAN
